title: Colin Wilson (artist)
content:

{{Youmay|the [[Star Wars comic books|''Star Wars'' comic book]] artist|other people named [[Colin Wilson (disambiguation)|Colin Wilson]]}}

|birth=[[October 31]], [[1940s#1949|1949]], [[Wikipedia:Christchurch|Christchurch]], [[Wikipedia:New Zealand|New Zealand]]<ref name="Europe Comics profile">{{WebCite|url=https://www.europecomics.com/author/wilson/|text=Colin Wilson|work=[[Wikipedia:Europe Comics|Europe Comics]]|archivedate=20250717035732}}</ref>

{{Quote|… it was a really steep learning curve. Working on "Legacy" wasn’t too critical. Being set 140 years after the Battle of Yavin, and beyond, allows for a little more freedom. It was the Rebellion story arc I illustrated last year that became the real test. This was also the first time that I had to visualize a lot of the Star Wars characters we all know and love — Luke, Leia, Admiral Ackbar… and so I went back to those early films and undertook some serious visual research.|Colin Wilson, on drawing for ''Star Wars''|<ref name="CBR interview">{{WebCite|url=http://www.comicbookresources.com/?page=article&id=19917|text=Interview with Colin Wilson|archivedate=20090210065859}}</ref>}}
'''Colin Wilson''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] artist who penciled interior and/or cover art for a number of ''[[Star Wars]]'' comics published by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]]. Born in [[Wikipedia:Christchurch|Christchurch]], [[Wikipedia:New Zealand|New Zealand]] in [[1940s#1949|1949]] on Halloween Day, he worked in New Zealand as a graphic artist, photographer, and freelance illustrator before moving to [[Wikipedia:London|London]] in [[1980]].<ref name="Europe Comics profile" />

Wilson has worked on issues of ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', [[Star Wars: Rebellion (comic series)|''Rebellion'']], and [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']], and was the interior artist for every issue of ''[[Star Wars: Invasion]]''.

{{Artist-stub}}
